infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow What's Up Dog! to access your camera to scan and identify dog breeds.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow What's Up Dog! to access your photos to scan dog breeds.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow What's Up Dog! to save photos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow What's Up Dog! to access your microphone.
